tests.name: App smoke test — catches black screen regressions renders the menu bar with View entry
App smoke test — catches black screen regressions renders the status bar footer
App smoke test — catches black screen regressions renders session rows when sessions exist
App smoke test — catches black screen regressions renders a <main> element as the top-level container
App smoke test — catches black screen regressions shows loading state before data arrives
App smoke test — catches black screen regressions shows error state when backend fails
Layout structure smoke tests renders the sidebar with plugin icons
Layout structure smoke tests renders the zone container for layout engine
Layout structure smoke tests renders the main zone with session content
Layout structure smoke tests renders sidebar, zone container, and status bar in correct order
Layout structure smoke tests status bar stays anchored at the bottom (flex-shrink: 0 in CSS)
Layout structure smoke tests session list renders inside the main zone without flicker
Notification plugin smoke tests renders a sidebar icon for the Notifications view
Notification plugin smoke tests clicking the Notifications sidebar icon shows the Notification Center view
Notification plugin smoke tests Notification Center shows empty state when no notifications
Notification plugin smoke tests Notification Center has a DND toggle button
App renders via plugin system and layout engine renders the ZoneRenderer container instead of hardcoded views
App renders via plugin system and layout engine renders session list inside the main zone via view registry
App renders via plugin system and layout engine preserves the MenuBar with View entry
App renders via plugin system and layout engine preserves the status bar footer with live metrics
App.tsx delegates view rendering to Layout Engine does not render SessionListView or EventDetailView directly in JSX
filterSessions is a pure function testable without DOM returns a filtered array given sessions, filterId, and now timestamp
Active Now filter shows only currently active sessions includes active sessions and excludes completed ones
Active Now filter with no active sessions returns empty returns empty array when all sessions are completed or stale
Last 15 min filter includes sessions with recent activity shows sessions at 5m and 10m, excludes 30m and 2h
Last 15 min filter includes session that spans the boundary session started 2h ago with last event 10m ago is included
Last 15 min filter always includes active sessions active sessions appear even though they are also within the window
Last hour filter includes sessions within 60 minutes shows sessions at 5m and 30m, excludes 2h and 25h
Last 24 hrs filter includes sessions within 24 hours shows sessions at 1h, 12h, 23h but excludes 48h
Filtered result length provides the count for the header 20 total sessions with 4 in last hour yields length 4
Filtered result length provides the count for the header 'all' filter returns all sessions
Empty result when no sessions match the filter returns empty array for display of 'No sessions in this time window'
Default 'all' filter returns every session no sessions are excluded
Session with null last_event_at is excluded from time windows session with no events is not included in time window filters
Empty sessions array returns empty for any filter no sessions in, no sessions out
SESSION_FILTER_PRESETS has an entry for each filter ID five presets with unique IDs and labels
